topic.title: 투자 계좌 개설
topic.description: 투자 계좌 개설 방법을 배우고, 금융 시장에 첫 발을 내딛어 보세요.

korean_scripts.korean_text: 안녕하세요, 투자 계좌 개설을 문의하려고 합니다.
네, 처음이신가요? 어떤 종류의 투자 계좌에 관심 있으신가요?
주식이나 펀드에 투자하고 싶은데, 처음 시작하기 좋은 계좌가 있을까요?
네, 가장 기본적인 투자 계좌가 있습니다. 필요한 서류가 무엇인가요?
서류 작성 후 제출하시면, 보통 며칠 내로 계좌가 개설됩니다.

foreign_scripts.foreign_text: Hello, I would like to inquire about opening an investment account.
foreign_scripts.chunked_text: Hello, | I would like to inquire about opening an investment account.

foreign_scripts.foreign_text: Yes, is this your first time? What kind of investment account are you interested in?
foreign_scripts.chunked_text: Yes, | is this your first time? | What kind of investment account are you interested in?

foreign_scripts.foreign_text: I want to invest in stocks or funds, is there a good account to start with?
foreign_scripts.chunked_text: I want to invest in stocks or funds, | is there a good account to start with?

foreign_scripts.foreign_text: Yes, we have the most basic investment account. What documents are needed?
foreign_scripts.chunked_text: Yes, we have the most basic investment account. | What documents are needed?

foreign_scripts.foreign_text: You will need your ID card and recent proof of income.
foreign_scripts.chunked_text: You will need your ID card and recent proof of income.

foreign_scripts.foreign_text: After you fill out the forms and submit them, the account is usually opened within a few days.
foreign_scripts.chunked_text: After you fill out the forms and submit them, | the account is usually opened within a few days.

foreign_scripts.foreign_text: Okay, Thank you for the guidance.
foreign_scripts.chunked_text: Okay, | Thank you for the guidance.

keyword_speeches.target_sentence: Hello, I would like to inquire about opening an investment account.
Yes, is this your first time? What kind of investment account are you interested in?
I want to invest in stocks or funds, is there a good account to start with?
Yes, we have the most basic investment account. What documents are needed?
You will need your ID card and recent proof of income.
After you fill out the forms and submit them, the account is usually opened within a few days.
Okay, Thank you for the guidance.

highlight_sentences.korean_text: 주식이나 펀드에 투자하고 싶은데, 처음 시작하기 좋은 계좌가 있을까요?
highlight_sentences.foreign_text: I want to invest in stocks or funds, is there a good account to start with?
highlight_sentences.reason: 이 문장은 학습자가 투자하려는 상품과 자신의 수준에 맞는 계좌를 문의하는 핵심적인 질문이기 때문입니다.
